present.title_on_plate: Proto-Nago: The First Signs of Survival
present.canon_implications: Source for data/nago_proto_signs.json; origin layer beneath the refined Nago system.
present.episode_usage: Visual reference for origin-era / pre-standardization signage.
present.alt_text: Illustrated reference plate titled Proto-Nago: The First Signs of Survival, showing fourteen hand-scratched survival marks with their meanings, the materials and surfaces they were made with, and a closing quote about why they were made.
present.tactile_notes: No tactile form documented on this plate; tactile forms for proto marks are AWAITING FRAGMENT.
open_questions: Which proto marks persisted into refined Nago and which were dropped or absorbed — not stated on either plate.

present.title_on_plate: Nago: Symbology of Umada — A Visual Language. A Survival Memory. A Promise to Understand.
present.canon_implications: Source for the eight core survival signs, seven function families, and five Visual Grammar primitives in data/nago_symbology.json and data/nago_signs.json.
present.episode_usage: Visual reference for Language & Signage and Nago Symbology sections; art direction reference for in-world signage.
present.alt_text: Illustrated reference plate titled Nago: Symbology of Umada, showing design principles, a five-symbol visual grammar, eight core survival signs with hand gestures and tactile forms, seven color-coded symbol families, examples of in-world signage, sign-combination phrase examples, a tactile-system explanation, and an honor and origin statement.
present.tactile_notes: Tactile form illustrated per core sign directly on the plate; source for written tactile-form descriptions.
open_questions: Vector/CSS-level shape spec for the Visual Grammar primitives is AWAITING a dedicated asset-extraction pass.

present.provenance: Realized animatic, UMADA_Aderin_SHIP_v1 ship package. Score: yellowbirdbeats.
present.episode_usage: Referenced from the Visual Archive section and the Cape Wipeout, Pt. 1 episode-release entry.
present.alt_text: Animatic video depicting the Friedmandostorp rescue sequence from Cape Wipeout, Pt. 1, scored by yellowbirdbeats.
open_questions: No transcript or caption track is present yet — required before this asset meets the accessibility baseline for public release.
